name: FAI_WORKFLOWS_B
description: This table stores the workflow information.

columns.Name: WORKFLOW_ID
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies the workflow

columns.Name: VERSION
columns.Comments: This column specifies the workflow version.

columns.Name: SEEDED_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column differentiates seeded data from customer created.

columns.Name: SOURCE_WORKFLOW_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies parent workflow, if any

columns.Name: USE_CASE_ID
columns.Comments: Identify usecase of the workflow

columns.Name: WORKFLOW_CODE
columns.Comments: Text identifier of the workflow

columns.Name: OWNER_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the owner who created the Gen AI Workflow.

columns.Name: OWNER_NAME
columns.Comments: This column identifies the owner of the workflow.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: This column provides status of the workflow.

columns.Name: ARCHITECTURE
columns.Comments: Architecture can be hierarchical, group, sequential, etc.

columns.Name: ACCESS_MODIFIER
columns.Comments: Access modifier of the workflow

columns.Name: SPECIFICATION
columns.Comments: JSON specification for the workflow

columns.Name: FAMILY
columns.Comments: Product family of the supported business object.

columns.Name: PRODUCT
columns.Comments: Product of the supported business object.

columns.Name: HIDDEN_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the workflow is visible or not.

columns.Name: START_QUESTION_1
columns.Comments: Slot number one for start question.

columns.Name: START_QUESTION_2
columns.Comments: Slot number two for start question.

columns.Name: START_QUESTION_3
columns.Comments: Slot number three for start question.

columns.Name: START_QUESTION_4
columns.Comments: Slot number four for start question.

columns.Name: START_QUESTION_5
columns.Comments: Slot number five for start question.

columns.Name: FOLLOW_UP_PROMPT_ENABLED
columns.Comments: Whether follow up prompt is enabled.

columns.Name: FOLLOW_UP_PROMPT
columns.Comments: This column stores the follow up prompt.

columns.Name: MODEL_CONFIG_ID
columns.Comments: Reference to a LLM model configuration. Foreign key to FAI_MODEL_CONFIGS table.

columns.Name: MAX_INTERACTIONS
columns.Comments: Maximum number of interactions with LLM engine.

columns.Name: START_AGENT_ID
columns.Comments: Start Agent in the associated Agent grapgh.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_NAME
columns.Comments: This column represents the system name of the Workflow.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This column represents the system description of the Workflow.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CUSTOM_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identifies if customizations have been made to the workflow or not

columns.Name: SOURCE_WORKFLOW_CODE
columns.Comments: Identifies parent workflow code, if any

columns.Name: IS_TEMPLATE
columns.Comments: Identifies if the workflow is a template or not

columns.Name: EMAIL_CONFIG_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the email account associated with the workflow

columns.Name: JOB_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the batch job request identifier

columns.Name: IS_AI_APPS_COMPATIBLE
columns.Comments: Identifies whether the workflow is compatible with AI applications
